---
name: Docs or Wiki
about: Report confusing, missing, or outdated KM Editor documentation.
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

# Page or section

Which README, wiki page, release note, or in app text needs attention?

# What is wrong or confusing?

Describe the problem.

# Suggested wording

If you have wording in mind, add it here.

# Screenshots

Add a cropped screenshot if it helps. Redact account names, local paths, notifications, and unrelated applications.

# File safety

Do not attach game dumps, executable game files, private saves, credentials, signing material, personal data, or complete generated mods.
